name.description: Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

source_instance_template.description: template to create the instance based on. It is recommended to reference instance templates through their unique id (`self_link_unique` attribute). - - -

zone.description: set, the provider zone is used. In addition to these, all arguments from `google_compute_instance` are supported as a way to override the properties in the template. All exported attributes from `google_compute_instance` are likewise exported here. To support removal of Optional/Computed fields in Terraform 0.12 the following fields are marked [Attributes as Blocks](/docs/configuration/attr-as-blocks.html): * `attached_disk` * `guest_accelerator` * `service_account` * `scratch_disk` * `network_interface.alias_ip_range` * `network_interface.access_config`
